defs: One who preserves from injury or violation; a protector; a preserver.
quotes: The great Creator and Conservator of the world.

defs: An officer who has charge of preserving the public peace, as a justice or sheriff.
One who has an official charge of preserving the rights and privileges of a city, corporation, community, or estate.
quotes: The lords of the secret council were likewise made conservators of the peace of the two kingdoms.
The conservator of the estate of an idiot.
